versions.version_description: It list all the chords for the whole song.

tuning: E A D G B E
content:
Capo 2

[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch] (Strum once)
I remember years ago[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch] (Strum once)
Someone told me I should take [/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]  (Strum once               [ch]G[/ch]
Caution when it comes to love I did, I did[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Am[/ch]                  [ch]F[/ch]
And you were strong and I was not [/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]            [ch]G[/ch]
My illusion, my mistake [/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]              [ch]F[/ch]        [ch]E[/ch]
I was careless, I forgot I did[/tab]
 
[Hook]
[tab]   [ch]Am[/ch]              [ch]F[/ch]                         [ch]G[/ch]
And now when all is done There is nothing to say [/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Dm[/ch]                    [ch]Am[/ch]
You have gone and so effortlessly [/tab]
[tab]         [ch]F[/ch]                    [ch]Em[/ch]
You have won You can go ahead tell them[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab]                [ch]Am[/ch] (strum once)
Tell them all I know now [/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]C[/ch] (Strum once)
Shout it from the roof tops [/tab]
[tab]                [ch]G[/ch] (Strum once)
Write it on the sky line [/tab]
[tab]              [ch]E[/ch] (Strum once)
All we had is gone now[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]Am[/ch]
Tell them I was happy [/tab]
[tab]                [ch]F[/ch]
And my heart is broken [/tab]
[tab]                 [ch]G[/ch]
All my scars are open [/tab]
[tab]                 [ch]Em[/ch]
Tell them what I hoped would be [/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Am[/ch]          [ch]F[/ch]          [ch]C[/ch]           [ch]G[/ch]
Impossible, impossible Impossible, impossible[/tab]

[Verse 2]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]
Falling out of love is hard [/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]
Falling for betrayal is worst [/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                             [ch]G[/ch]
Broken trust and broken hearts I know, I know[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]
Thinking all you need is there [/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]
Building faith on love and words [/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                        [ch]Em[/ch]
Empty promises will wear I know, I know[/tab]

[Hook]
[tab]    [ch]Am[/ch]              [ch]F[/ch]                        [ch]C[/ch]
And now when all is gone There is nothing to say [/tab]
[tab]              [ch]Dm[/ch]                     [ch]Am[/ch]
And if you're done with embarrassing me [/tab]
[tab]        [ch]C[/ch]                    [ch]G[/ch]
On your own you can go ahead tell them[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab]                [ch]Am[/ch]
Tell them all I know now [/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]C[/ch]
Shout it from the roof tops [/tab]
[tab]                [ch]G[/ch]
Write it on the sky line [/tab]
[tab]              [ch]E[/ch]
All we had is gone now[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]Am[/ch]
Tell them I was happy [/tab]
[tab]                [ch]F[/ch]
And my heart is broken [/tab]
[tab]                 [ch]C[/ch]
All my scars are open [/tab]
[tab]                 [ch]Dm[/ch]          [ch]E[/ch]
Tell them what I hoped would be [/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Am[/ch]           [ch]F[/ch]          [ch]C[/ch]          [ch]Em[/ch]          [ch]Am[/ch]          [ch]F[/ch]
Impossible, impossible Impossible, impossible Impossible, impossible [/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                  [ch]E[/ch]       
Impossible, impossible! [/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]    [ch]F[/ch]       [ch]C[/ch]   [ch]G[/ch]     [ch]G[/ch]      
   Ooh impossible yeah, yeah.[/tab]

[Bridge]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch] (strum once)      [ch]F[/ch] (strum once)
I remember years ago Someone told me I should take [/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch] (strum once)                [ch]G[/ch] (Strum once)
Caution when it comes to love I did[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab]                [ch]Am[/ch]
Tell them all I know now [/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]C[/ch]
Shout it from the roof tops [/tab]
[tab]                [ch]G[/ch]
Write it on the sky line [/tab]
[tab]              [ch]E[/ch]
All we had is gone now[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]Am[/ch]
Tell them I was happy [/tab]
[tab]                [ch]F[/ch]
And my heart is broken [/tab]
[tab]                 [ch]C[/ch]
All my scars are open [/tab]
[tab]                 [ch]Dm[/ch]          [ch]E[/ch]
Tell them what I hoped would be [/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Am[/ch]          [ch]F[/ch]           [ch]C[/ch]          [ch]Em[/ch]          [ch]Am[/ch]           [ch]F[/ch]
Impossible, impossible Impossible, impossible, Impossible, impossible [/tab]
[tab]      [ch]C[/ch]           [ch]E[/ch]
Impossible, impossible[/tab]

[Outro]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch](strum once)
I remember years ago [/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch] (strum once)
Someone told me I should take [/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch] (strum once)
Caution when it comes to love [/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch] (strum once and let it echo out)
I did...[/tab]
